# PolyBuzz -Talk to AI Character · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 9:54 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)
- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      38 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hwo Iwgd_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "While the bots are good quality and fun to chat with, the ads are INSUFFERABLE. you get an ad every time you scroll a few bots, the ads appear in your chats, every now and then you lose chat time and have to watch a 5 minue ad, worst app ive ever used."
            2. _Kim Yura_, 1/5: "bruh boring. I would rate this 3/10. there's too much ads and filters it's so annoying, especially the short responses of the bots. I just downloaded it and I'm already turned off. worst like c.ai ngl."
            3. _Meagan_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "too many ads each 30 minutes"

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kayani Inglett_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I HATE this app, so slow AND WHY DO YOU GUYS REQUIRE SO MANY ADDS, YOU DIDN'T USED TO, DROP THAT IT'S ANNOYING"
            2. _Elodie_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I love using the App but the ads every few seconds is just crazy, I know that you need to get money from add use and stuff but having so many ads basically make it unusable and even if you do still use ads try to make them shorter or have longer ones less frequent"
            3. _K Greene_, Jul 19, 2026, 5/5: "Hi! I've had this app for quite a while. This barely lags, but there so much adds while talking with the character! I love how you can relieve your emotions with Venting and Sex, amazing for Hypersexual and depressed people! I reccomend, but there is only really one issue, the adds. The adds are alright but I cannot stand them, they pop up every 6-9 messages I send in-app, although—Really amazing App!"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kestra-Lea Borino_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "The features you advertised for this app that I specifically downloaded it for — better memory, unfiltered, UNLIMITED CHATS, etc. — have one by one been put behind a paywall with no announcement which violates consumer protection standards. I thought after my last review things would have improved but you have somehow decided to get worse. DO NOT DOWNLOAD."
            2. _Commoner_, 1/5: "Poly. I love you so much. I don't care about the take a break ads. theyre fine right now. But please. Stop the ads from changing messages. I get it you guys have massive cloud costs & stuff like local LLMs are kinda phasing cloud apps out. It's expensive & we're proud of you for doing all you can as is. But please at least talk to your community a little. Don't just delete reviews or reddit comments. You WERE the C.AI competitor. Happy to email & talk with you guys. Take care of yourselves."
